3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input autofocus="" class="uk-search-input uk-text-center" name="s" placeholder="Søk" required="" type="search"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input autofocus="" class="uk-search-input" name="s" placeholder="Søk..." type="search" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (2 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (2) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link screen-reader-text" href="#content" tabindex="2">Hopp til innhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (3) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link screen-reader-text" href="#navigation" tabindex="3">Hopp til navigasjon</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only

SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: '+i+dl;f.parentNode.insertBefore(j,f); })(window,document,' appears 2 times

id="+i+dl;f.parentNode.insertBefore(j,f); })(window,document,"
Each ID must be unique on the page

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input autofocus="" class="uk-search-input uk-text-center" name="s" placeholder="Søk" required="" type="search"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input autofocus="" class="uk-search-input" name="s" placeholder="Søk..." type="search" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (2 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (2) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link screen-reader-text" href="#content" tabindex="2">Hopp til innhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (3) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link screen-reader-text" href="#navigation" tabindex="3">Hopp til navigasjon</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.1 Parsing (1 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: '+i+dl;f.parentNode.insertBefore(j,f); })(window,document,' appears 2 times

id="+i+dl;f.parentNode.insertBefore(j,f); })(window,document,"
Each ID must be unique on the page

iframe is missing title attribute

Add descriptive title attribute to iframe

SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="1" style="position: absolute; top: 0px; left: 0px; border: none; visibility: hidden;" width="1"></iframe>
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

<div class="language-option" data-l="en" role="option" style="cursor: pointer;" tabindex="-1"><a href="https://kilden.com/en/ledige-stillinger/" id="weglot-language-en" lang="en" role="none" style="co
Add aria-selected attribute to element with role='option'
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='img' needs an accessible name

Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute

MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3 class="el-title uk-card-title uk-margin-top uk-margin-remove-bottom"> <span class="uk-link-heading">Påske-regissøren: — Strindberg er noe jeg ikke kan si nei til</span> </h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no main landmark

<body>
Add <main> element or role='main' to wrap primary content
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input autofocus="" class="uk-search-input uk-text-center" name="s" placeholder="Search" required="" type="search"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input autofocus="" class="uk-search-input" name="s" placeholder="Search..." type="search" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (2 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (2) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link screen-reader-text" href="#content" tabindex="2">Skip to content</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (3) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link screen-reader-text" href="#navigation" tabindex="3">Skip to navigation</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.1 Parsing (1 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: '+i+dl;f.parentNode.insertBefore(j,f); })(window,document,' appears 2 times

id="+i+dl;f.parentNode.insertBefore(j,f); })(window,document,"
Each ID must be unique on the page
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (5 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-WKDTZHP" style="display:none;visibility:hidden" width="0"></iframe>
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-WKDTZHP" style="display:none;visibility:hidden" width="0"></iframe>
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="1" style="position: absolute; top: 0px; left: 0px; border: none; visibility: hidden;" width="1"></iframe>
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Role 'option' requires aria-selected attribute

<div class="language-option" data-l="nb" role="option" style="cursor: pointer;" tabindex="-1"><a href="https://kilden.com/" id="weglot-language-nb" lang="nb" role="none" style="color: rgb(51, 51, 51);
Add aria-selected attribute to element with role='option'
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='img' needs an accessible name

<svg aria-hidden="true" class="svg-inline--fa fa-times fa-w-11" data-icon="times" data-prefix="fas" focusable="false" role="img" viewbox="0 0 352 512" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M242.
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute

Add a single h1 heading that describes the page content

First heading is h3, should start with h1

Start your heading structure with h1

MODERATE

Page has no main landmark

<body>
Add <main> element or role='main' to wrap primary content

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input autofocus="" class="uk-search-input uk-text-center" name="s" placeholder="Søk" required="" type="search"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input autofocus="" class="uk-search-input" name="s" placeholder="Søk..." type="search" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (2 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (2) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link screen-reader-text" href="#content" tabindex="2">Hopp til innhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (3) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link screen-reader-text" href="#navigation" tabindex="3">Hopp til navigasjon</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.1 Parsing (1 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: '+i+dl;f.parentNode.insertBefore(j,f); })(window,document,' appears 2 times

id="+i+dl;f.parentNode.insertBefore(j,f); })(window,document,"
Each ID must be unique on the page
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (4 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-WKDTZHP" style="display:none;visibility:hidden" width="0"></iframe>
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-WKDTZHP" style="display:none;visibility:hidden" width="0"></iframe>
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="1" style="position: absolute; top: 0px; left: 0px; border: none; visibility: hidden;" width="1"></iframe>
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='img' needs an accessible name

Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute

<body>

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input autofocus="" class="uk-search-input uk-text-center" name="s" placeholder="Søk" required="" type="search"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input autofocus="" class="uk-search-input" name="s" placeholder="Søk..." type="search" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (2 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (2) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link screen-reader-text" href="#content" tabindex="2">Hopp til innhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (3) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link screen-reader-text" href="#navigation" tabindex="3">Hopp til navigasjon</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only

Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: '+i+dl;f.parentNode.insertBefore(j,f); })(window,document,' appears 2 times

id="+i+dl;f.parentNode.insertBefore(j,f); })(window,document,"
Each ID must be unique on the page

iframe is missing title attribute

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input autofocus="" class="uk-search-input uk-text-center" name="s" placeholder="Søk" required="" type="search"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input autofocus="" class="uk-search-input" name="s" placeholder="Søk..." type="search" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (2 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (2) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link screen-reader-text" href="#content" tabindex="2">Hopp til innhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (3) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link screen-reader-text" href="#navigation" tabindex="3">Hopp til navigasjon</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.1 Parsing (1 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: '+i+dl;f.parentNode.insertBefore(j,f); })(window,document,' appears 2 times

id="+i+dl;f.parentNode.insertBefore(j,f); })(window,document,"
Each ID must be unique on the page
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (5 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-WKDTZHP" style="display:none;visibility:hidden" width="0"></iframe>
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-WKDTZHP" style="display:none;visibility:hidden" width="0"></iframe>
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="1" style="position: absolute; top: 0px; left: 0px; border: none; visibility: hidden;" width="1"></iframe>
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Role 'option' requires aria-selected attribute

<div class="language-option" data-l="en" role="option" style="cursor: pointer;" tabindex="-1"><a href="https://kilden.com/en/avdelinger/kilden-opera/" id="weglot-language-en" lang="en" role="none" sty
Add aria-selected attribute to element with role='option'
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='img' needs an accessible name

<svg aria-hidden="true" class="svg-inline--fa fa-times fa-w-11" data-icon="times" data-prefix="fas" focusable="false" role="img" viewbox="0 0 352 512" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M242.
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute

<svg height="18" viewbox="0 0 448 512" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M224 416c-8.188 0-16.38-3.125-22.62-9.375l-192-192c-12.5-12.5-12.5-32.75 0-45.25s32.75-12.5 45.25 0L224 338.8l169.4-1
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (4 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3 class="uk-flex uk-flex-middle uk-margin-remove-bottom"> <span class="uk-margin-small-right uk-icon" uk-icon="calendar"><svg height="20" viewbox="0 0 20 20" width="20" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no main landmark

<body>
Add <main> element or role='main' to wrap primary content
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="uk-navbar" uk-navbar='{"container":".tm-header-mobile > [uk-sticky]"}'> <div class="uk-navbar-left"> <a aria-label="Back to home" class="uk-logo uk-navbar-item" href="https://kilden.com
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="uk-navbar" uk-navbar='{"align":"left","container":".tm-header","boundary":".tm-header .uk-navbar-container"}'> <div class="uk-navbar-left"> <a aria-label="Back to home" class="uk-logo uk-n
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input autofocus="" class="uk-search-input uk-text-center" name="s" placeholder="Søk" required="" type="search"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input autofocus="" class="uk-search-input" name="s" placeholder="Søk..." type="search" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (2 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (2) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link screen-reader-text" href="#content" tabindex="2">Hopp til innhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (3) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link screen-reader-text" href="#navigation" tabindex="3">Hopp til navigasjon</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.1 Parsing (1 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: '+i+dl;f.parentNode.insertBefore(j,f); })(window,document,' appears 2 times

id="+i+dl;f.parentNode.insertBefore(j,f); })(window,document,"
Each ID must be unique on the page
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (5 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-WKDTZHP" style="display:none;visibility:hidden" width="0"></iframe>
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-WKDTZHP" style="display:none;visibility:hidden" width="0"></iframe>
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="1" style="position: absolute; top: 0px; left: 0px; border: none; visibility: hidden;" width="1"></iframe>
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Role 'option' requires aria-selected attribute

<div class="language-option" data-l="en" role="option" style="cursor: pointer;" tabindex="-1"><a href="https://kilden.com/en/forestilling/frost-12-on-ice/" id="weglot-language-en" lang="en" role="none
Add aria-selected attribute to element with role='option'
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='img' needs an accessible name

<svg aria-hidden="true" class="svg-inline--fa fa-times fa-w-11" data-icon="times" data-prefix="fas" focusable="false" role="img" viewbox="0 0 352 512" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M242.
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute

Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h4

<h4 style="text-align: center;"><span>Konserter som allerede er avholdt, trekkes automatisk fra prisen på Gull-, Sølv- og Crescendoserien.</span></h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h4

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input autofocus="" class="uk-search-input uk-text-center" name="s" placeholder="Søk" required="" type="search"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input autofocus="" class="uk-search-input" name="s" placeholder="Søk..." type="search" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (2 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (2) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link screen-reader-text" href="#content" tabindex="2">Hopp til innhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (3) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link screen-reader-text" href="#navigation" tabindex="3">Hopp til navigasjon</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
2.4.1 Hopp over blokker (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.1 (2.4.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no skip link to bypass navigation

<body>
Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>

id="+i+dl;f.parentNode.insertBefore(j,f); })(window,document,"
Each ID must be unique on the page

Element with role='img' needs an accessible name

<svg aria-hidden="true" class="svg-inline--fa fa-times fa-w-11" data-icon="times" data-prefix="fas" focusable="false" role="img" viewbox="0 0 352 512" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M242.
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute

SERIOUS

Role 'option' requires aria-selected attribute

Add aria-selected attribute to element with role='option'

SERIOUS

Page is missing h1 heading

<body class="wp-singular post-template-default single single-post postid-1133464 single-format-standard wp-theme-yootheme wp-child-theme-kilden2020" data-cmplz="1"> <!-- Google Tag Manager (noscript)
Add a single h1 heading that describes the page content
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (4 avvik)

MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 style="text-align: center;">OPPLEV DET BESTE AV KRISTIANSANDS KUNST- OG KULTURLIV</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1

MODERATE

Page has no main landmark

<body>
Add <main> element or role='main' to wrap primary content

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input autofocus="" class="uk-search-input uk-text-center" name="s" placeholder="Søk" required="" type="search"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input autofocus="" class="uk-search-input" name="s" placeholder="Søk..." type="search" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (2 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (2) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link screen-reader-text" href="#content" tabindex="2">Hopp til innhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (3) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link screen-reader-text" href="#navigation" tabindex="3">Hopp til navigasjon</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.1 Parsing (4 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: '+i+dl;f.parentNode.insertBefore(j,f); })(window,document,' appears 2 times

id="+i+dl;f.parentNode.insertBefore(j,f); })(window,document,"
Each ID must be unique on the page

SERIOUS

id="1"
Each ID must be unique on the page

SERIOUS

id="3"

1.2.2 Teksting (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.2.2 (1.2.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Video has no captions track

<video autoplay="" controls="" muted="" src="/wp-content/uploads/Kunstsilo-liden.mp4" width="1200"></video>
Add <track kind='captions' src='captions.vtt' srclang='nb' label='Norsk'>
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (5 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-WKDTZHP" style="display:none;visibility:hidden" width="0"></iframe>
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input autofocus="" class="uk-search-input uk-text-center" name="s" placeholder="Søk" required="" type="search"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input autofocus="" class="uk-search-input" name="s" placeholder="Søk..." type="search" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (2 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (2) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link screen-reader-text" href="#content" tabindex="2">Hopp til innhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (3) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link screen-reader-text" href="#navigation" tabindex="3">Hopp til navigasjon</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only

CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input autofocus="" class="uk-search-input uk-text-center" name="s" placeholder="Søk" required="" type="search"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input autofocus="" class="uk-search-input" name="s" placeholder="Søk..." type="search" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.

SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (2) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link screen-reader-text" href="#content" tabindex="2">Hopp til innhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (3) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link screen-reader-text" href="#navigation" tabindex="3">Hopp til navigasjon</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input autofocus="" class="uk-search-input uk-text-center" name="s" placeholder="Søk" required="" type="search"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input autofocus="" class="uk-search-input" name="s" placeholder="Søk..." type="search" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (2 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (2) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link screen-reader-text" href="#content" tabindex="2">Hopp til innhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (3) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link screen-reader-text" href="#navigation" tabindex="3">Hopp til navigasjon</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.1 Parsing (1 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: '+i+dl;f.parentNode.insertBefore(j,f); })(window,document,' appears 2 times

id="+i+dl;f.parentNode.insertBefore(j,f); })(window,document,"
Each ID must be unique on the page
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (5 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-WKDTZHP" style="display:none;visibility:hidden" width="0"></iframe>
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-WKDTZHP" style="display:none;visibility:hidden" width="0"></iframe>
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="1" style="position: absolute; top: 0px; left: 0px; border: none; visibility: hidden;" width="1"></iframe>
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Role 'option' requires aria-selected attribute

<div class="language-option" data-l="en" role="option" style="cursor: pointer;" tabindex="-1"><a href="" id="weglot-language-en" lang="en" role="none" style="color: rgb(51, 51, 51); opacity: 0.4;" tab
Add aria-selected attribute to element with role='option'
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='img' needs an accessible name

<svg aria-hidden="true" class="svg-inline--fa fa-times fa-w-11" data-icon="times" data-prefix="fas" focusable="false" role="img" viewbox="0 0 352 512" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M242.
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute

SVG is missing accessible name

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input autofocus="" class="uk-search-input uk-text-center" name="s" placeholder="Søk" required="" type="search"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input autofocus="" class="uk-search-input" name="s" placeholder="Søk..." type="search" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (2 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (2) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link screen-reader-text" href="#content" tabindex="2">Hopp til innhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (3) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link screen-reader-text" href="#navigation" tabindex="3">Hopp til navigasjon</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no main landmark

<body>
Add <main> element or role='main' to wrap primary content
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="uk-navbar" uk-navbar='{"container":".tm-header-mobile > [uk-sticky]"}'> <div class="uk-navbar-left"> <a aria-label="Back to home" class="uk-logo uk-navbar-item" href="https://kilden.com
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="uk-navbar" uk-navbar='{"align":"left","container":".tm-header","boundary":".tm-header .uk-navbar-container"}'> <div class="uk-navbar-left"> <a aria-label="Back to home" class="uk-logo uk-n
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
4.1.1 Parsing (1 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: '+i+dl;f.parentNode.insertBefore(j,f); })(window,document,' appears 2 times

id="+i+dl;f.parentNode.insertBefore(j,f); })(window,document,"
Each ID must be unique on the page
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (5 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-WKDTZHP" style="display:none;visibility:hidden" width="0"></iframe>
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-WKDTZHP" style="display:none;visibility:hidden" width="0"></iframe>
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="1" style="position: absolute; top: 0px; left: 0px; border: none; visibility: hidden;" width="1"></iframe>
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Role 'option' requires aria-selected attribute

<div class="language-option" data-l="en" role="option" style="cursor: pointer;" tabindex="-1"><a href="https://kilden.com/en/forestilling/kammerkonsert-lund-kirke/" id="weglot-language-en" lang="en" r
Add aria-selected attribute to element with role='option'
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='img' needs an accessible name

<svg aria-hidden="true" class="svg-inline--fa fa-times fa-w-11" data-icon="times" data-prefix="fas" focusable="false" role="img" viewbox="0 0 352 512" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M242.
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input autofocus="" class="uk-search-input uk-text-center" name="s" placeholder="Søk" required="" type="search"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input autofocus="" class="uk-search-input" name="s" placeholder="Søk..." type="search" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (2 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (2) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link screen-reader-text" href="#content" tabindex="2">Hopp til innhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (3) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link screen-reader-text" href="#navigation" tabindex="3">Hopp til navigasjon</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only

<body>

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input autofocus="" class="uk-search-input uk-text-center" name="s" placeholder="Søk" required="" type="search"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input autofocus="" class="uk-search-input" name="s" placeholder="Søk..." type="search" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (2 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (2) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link screen-reader-text" href="#content" tabindex="2">Hopp til innhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (3) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link screen-reader-text" href="#navigation" tabindex="3">Hopp til navigasjon</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no main landmark

<body>
Add <main> element or role='main' to wrap primary content
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="uk-navbar" uk-navbar='{"container":".tm-header-mobile > [uk-sticky]"}'> <div class="uk-navbar-left"> <a aria-label="Back to home" class="uk-logo uk-navbar-item" href="https://kilden.com
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="uk-navbar" uk-navbar='{"align":"left","container":".tm-header","boundary":".tm-header .uk-navbar-container"}'> <div class="uk-navbar-left"> <a aria-label="Back to home" class="uk-logo uk-n
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
4.1.1 Parsing (2 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: '+i+dl;f.parentNode.insertBefore(j,f); })(window,document,' appears 2 times

id="+i+dl;f.parentNode.insertBefore(j,f); })(window,document,"
Each ID must be unique on the page
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: 'page#1-0-0-0' appears 2 times

id="page#1-0-0-0"
Each ID must be unique on the page
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (5 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-WKDTZHP" style="display:none;visibility:hidden" width="0"></iframe>
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-WKDTZHP" style="display:none;visibility:hidden" width="0"></iframe>
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="1" style="position: absolute; top: 0px; left: 0px; border: none; visibility: hidden;" width="1"></iframe>
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Role 'option' requires aria-selected attribute

CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a href="https://www.sobo.no/" rel="nofollow noopener noreferrer" target="_blank"><picture> <source sizes="(min-width: 51px) 51px" srcset="/wp-content/themes/yootheme/cache/7d/bosor-logo-web-7d2f0157.
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input autofocus="" class="uk-search-input uk-text-center" name="s" placeholder="Søk" required="" type="search"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input autofocus="" class="uk-search-input" name="s" placeholder="Søk..." type="search" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (2 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (2) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link screen-reader-text" href="#content" tabindex="2">Hopp til innhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (3) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link screen-reader-text" href="#navigation" tabindex="3">Hopp til navigasjon</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
2.4.1 Hopp over blokker (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.1 (2.4.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no skip link to bypass navigation

<body>
Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
4.1.1 Parsing (1 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: '+i+dl;f.parentNode.insertBefore(j,f); })(window,document,' appears 2 times

id="+i+dl;f.parentNode.insertBefore(j,f); })(window,document,"
Each ID must be unique on the page
1.2.2 Teksting (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.2.2 (1.2.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Video has no captions track

<video controls="" src="/wp-content/uploads/Atle-promo-1080x1080-1.mp4"></video>
Add <track kind='captions' src='captions.vtt' srclang='nb' label='Norsk'>
Testregel 1.2.2 (1.2.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Video has no captions track

<video autoplay="" controls="" muted="" src="/wp-content/uploads/SNF-1920x1080-leseprove-web.mp4"></video>
Add <track kind='captions' src='captions.vtt' srclang='nb' label='Norsk'>
Testregel 1.2.2 (1.2.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Video has no captions track

<video autoplay="" controls="" muted="" src="/wp-content/uploads/SNF-promo-logo-1920x1080-2.mp4" width="1200"></video>
Add <track kind='captions' src='captions.vtt' srclang='nb' label='Norsk'>
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (6 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-WKDTZHP" style="display:none;visibility:hidden" width="0"></iframe>
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-WKDTZHP" style="display:none;visibility:hidden" width="0"></iframe>
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe allow="autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; fullscreen; picture-in-picture" allowfullscreen="allowfullscreen" data-testid="embed-iframe" frameborder="0" height="352" loading="lazy" src=
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="1" style="position: absolute; top: 0px; left: 0px; border: none; visibility: hidden;" width="1"></iframe>
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='img' needs an accessible name

<svg aria-hidden="true" class="svg-inline--fa fa-times fa-w-11" data-icon="times" data-prefix="fas" focusable="false" role="img" viewbox="0 0 352 512" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M242.
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Role 'option' requires aria-selected attribute

<div class="language-option" data-l="en" role="option" style="cursor: pointer;" tabindex="-1"><a href="https://kilden.com/en/forestilling/saturday-night-fever/" id="weglot-language-en" lang="en" role=
Add aria-selected attribute to element with role='option'

Testreglene er basert på UU-tilsynets offisielle testregler

🔄 Start ny skanning

https://www.kilden.com
1-500

Kopier kommandoen:

python checker.py https://www.kilden.com --max-pages 16 --format html
